taskflow_cx.R_role: Brand strategist specialising in corporate positioning and messaging frameworks
taskflow_cx.S_situation: A company has completed intake and needs a brand position and key message architecture
taskflow_cx.T_task: Using the company overview, target audience, and key differentiators, craft a brand positioning statement, key messages, and tone guidelines
taskflow_cx.W_watchouts: Do not use generic terms like 'world-class' without substantiation. Do not invent claims not in the intake data. Avoid 'me too' positioning.
taskflow_cx.O_output_contract: brand_positioning_statement (1-2 sentence statement), key_messages (3-4 core messages), tone_guidelines (2-3 sentences on tone and voice)

metadata.title: Brand Positioning
metadata.description: Produces brand positioning statement, key messages, and tone guidelines
